get.description: Read several Application details identified by their unique Company ID.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

count.description: Total number of records available across all pages

next.description: URL to the next page of results

previous.description: URL to the previous page of results

id.description: Kini ID of the application

job.description: Kini ID of the job applied for (either job or external_job_id is required)

company.description: Kini ID of the company offering the job

external_job_id.description: Job's ID in external ATS systems, used for integrations (either job or external_job_id is required)

partner.description: Kini ID of the partner involved in the application

partner_application_id.description: External ID of the application in the partner's system (e.g. Jobboard)

partner_company_id.description: External ID of the company in the partner's system (e.g. ATS)

partner_job_id.description: External ID of the job in the partner's system (e.g. Jobboard)

agency.description: Kini ID of the agency distributing the application

agency_job_id.description: External ID of the job in the agency's system

gender.description: Applicant's gender. Enum: MALE (Male), FEMALE (Female), DIVERSE (Diverse), NOT_SPECIFIED (Not Specified).

language.description: Applicant's preferred language as an ISO 639-1 code (e.g. 'en', 'de')

skills.description: An array representing the applicant's skills

social_links.description: Social media links as key-value pairs where key is the platform name and value is the profile URL

id.description: ID of the screening question, must match the ID of a screening question in the company's ATS

answer_type.description: Answer type of the screening question

type.description: Attachment type. Possible values: `cv` (CV), `cover-letter` (Cover Letter), `photo` (Photo), `other` (Other Attachments).

content_type.description: MIME type of the attachment. Enum: application/msword (Doc), application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document (Docx), image/jpeg (Jpeg), application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text (Odt), application/pdf (Pdf), text/plain (Plain Text), image/png (Png), application/rtf (Rtf), application/octet-stream (Other).

attachments.description: List of attachments provided by the applicant

channel.description: External posting channel from which the application was received

sync_status.description: Indicates the current state of the application synchronization to the company's ATS. Enum: SUCCESS (Sync Successful), EXPECTED_FAILURE (Sync Failed Expectedly, No Action Needed), FAILURE (Sync Failed), NOTSENT (Sync Not Triggered).

failure_error.description: Error message if the application synchronization failed

post.description: Create a Job Application to a Company using the Company's ID.

job.description: Kini ID of the job applied for (either job or external_job_id is required)

external_job_id.description: Job's ID in external ATS systems, used for integrations (either job or external_job_id is required)

partner.description: Kini ID of the partner involved in the application

partner_application_id.description: External ID of the application in the partner's system (e.g. Jobboard)

partner_company_id.description: External ID of the company in the partner's system (e.g. ATS)

partner_job_id.description: External ID of the job in the partner's system (e.g. Jobboard)

agency.description: Kini ID of the agency distributing the application

agency_job_id.description: External ID of the job in the agency's system

gender.description: Applicant's gender. Enum: MALE (Male), FEMALE (Female), DIVERSE (Diverse), NOT_SPECIFIED (Not Specified).

skills.description: An array representing the applicant's skills

social_links.description: Social media links as key-value pairs where key is the platform name and value is the profile URL

id.description: ID of the screening question, must match the ID of a screening question in the company's ATS

answer_type.description: Answer type of the screening question

answer.description:
Answer of the screening question. The expected data type for the 'answer' field depends on the 'answer_type':
  * 'text', 'textarea', 'select': expects a `str`.
  * 'boolean': expects a `bool`.
  * 'multiselect': expects an `array of strings`.

type.description: Type of attachment. Enum: cv (CV), cover-letter (Cover Letter), photo (Photo), other (Other Attachments).

content_type.description: MIME type of the attachment. Enum: application/msword (Doc), application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document (Docx), image/jpeg (Jpeg), application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text (Odt), application/pdf (Pdf), text/plain (Plain Text), image/png (Png), application/rtf (Rtf), application/octet-stream (Other).

get.description: Read several Job details identified by their unique Company ID.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

count.description: Total number of records available across all pages

next.description: URL to the next page of results

previous.description: URL to the previous page of results

id.description: Kini ID of the job

external_id.description: Job's ID in external ATS systems, used for integrations

company.description: Kini ID of the company offering the job

description.description: Detailed description of the job's responsibilities and requirements

posting_url.description: URL of the job posted on the company's career page

application_url.description: URL through which applicants can apply on the company's career page

application_email.description: Email address through which applicants can apply

status.description: Posting status of the job (active, deleted, archived)

remote.description: Work mode of the job (remote, hybrid, on-site)

language.description: Language of the job posting as an ISO 639-1 code (e.g. 'en', 'de')

work_schedule.description: Work schedule for the job (full_time, part_time, flexible)

employment_type.description: Employment type of the job (permanent, contract, minijob, etc.)

work_schedule.description: Work schedule type for the position (full-time, part-time, flexible)

contract_limitation.description: Contractual limitations or terms associated with the job

location_name.description: Full-text location of where the job is based

postcode.description: Postal code of the job's location

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the job's location

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the job's location

salary.description: General description of the salary package

salary_frequency.description: Payout frequency of the stated salary (annual, monthly, etc.)

contact_name.description: Name of the contact person responsible for the job posting

contact_email.description: E-Mail Address of the contact person responsible for the job posting

contact_title.description: Work title of the contact person responsible for the job posting

contact_phone.description: Phone Number of the contact person responsible for the job posting

id.description: ID of the screening question, must match the ID of a screening question in the company's ATS

answer_type.description: Answer type of the screening question

required.description: Whether the screening question is required

label.description: Label of the screening question option

value.description: Value of the screening question option, must match the value of a screening question option in the company's ATS

options.description: Required for select and multiselect answer types

id.description: ID of the section

custom_fields.description: Custom fields for the job posting as key-value pairs

get.description: List companies that the authenticated user has access to through agencies or partners.

id.description: Unique Kini ID of the company

ats.description: The company's ATS, to which the synchronization happens

partner.description: Array of Kini IDs of the company's partners, from which it is receiving data

agency.description: Array of Kini IDs of the company's used agencies

candidate_sync_active.description: Whether the company's synchronization of candidates to the ATS is activated

job_sync_active.description: Whether the company's synchronization of jobs from the ATS is activated

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the company was first created

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the company was last updated

post.summary: Create a clickout link to access the shop
post.description: Creates a new clickout link to access the shop

external_job_id.description: External Job ID of the job to promote

data.description: The clickout URL for accessing the shop

sync_status.description: Indicates the current state of the application synchronization to the company's ATS. Enum: SUCCESS (Sync Successful), EXPECTED_FAILURE (Sync Failed Expectedly, No Action Needed), FAILURE (Sync Failed), NOTSENT (Sync Not Triggered).

failure_error.description: Error message if the application synchronization failed

job.description: Kini ID of the job applied for (either job or external_job_id is required)

external_job_id.description: Job's ID in external ATS systems, used for integrations (either job or external_job_id is required)

partner.description: Kini ID of the partner involved in the application

partner_application_id.description: External ID of the application in the partner's system (e.g. Jobboard)

partner_company_id.description: External ID of the company in the partner's system (e.g. ATS)

partner_job_id.description: External ID of the job in the partner's system (e.g. Jobboard)

agency.description: Kini ID of the agency distributing the application

agency_job_id.description: External ID of the job in the agency's system

gender.description: Applicant's gender. Enum: MALE (Male), FEMALE (Female), DIVERSE (Diverse), NOT_SPECIFIED (Not Specified).

language.description: Applicant's preferred language as an ISO 639-1 code (e.g. 'en', 'de')

skills.description: An array representing the applicant's skills

social_links.description: Social media links as key-value pairs where key is the platform name and value is the profile URL

id.description: ID of the screening question, must match the ID of a screening question in the company's ATS

answer_type.description: Answer type of the screening question

type.description: Type of attachment. Enum: cv (CV), cover-letter (Cover Letter), photo (Photo), other (Other Attachments).

content_type.description: MIME type of the attachment. Enum: application/msword (Doc), application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document (Docx), image/jpeg (Jpeg), application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text (Odt), application/pdf (Pdf), text/plain (Plain Text), image/png (Png), application/rtf (Rtf), application/octet-stream (Other).

attachments.description: List of attachments provided by the applicant

channel.description: External posting channel from which the application was received

answer_type.description:
* `boolean` - boolean
* `text` - text
* `textarea` - textarea
* `select` - select
* `multiselect` - multiselect

id.description: ID of the screening question, must match the ID of a screening question in the company's ATS

answer_type.description: Answer type of the screening question

answer.description:
Answer of the screening question. The expected data type for the 'answer' field depends on the 'answer_type':
  * 'text', 'textarea', 'select': expects a `str`.
  * 'boolean': expects a `bool`.
  * 'multiselect': expects an `array of strings`.
